item: High-core-count x86-64 Linux workstation, 128 GB RAM, 4 TB NVMe
purpose: Reproducible kernel/platform builds, symbols, local CI and emulation
verify_before_order: ECC/virtualization support, Linux compatibility, warranty, regional price
notes: A 64 GB/2 TB configuration is the lean minimum; storage and RAM headroom reduce iteration time.

item: CI runner, backup/NAS and artifact storage
purpose: Clean builds, evidence retention, trace corpus and recovery
verify_before_order: Off-site backup, access control, encryption, power protection
notes: Cloud capacity may substitute initially but evidence and hardware traces need controlled retention.

item: UART/JTAG adapters, level shifters, cables, breakout boards and isolation
purpose: Safe early boot and board diagnostics
verify_before_order: Voltage levels, target headers, galvanic isolation where needed
notes: Buy duplicates; label and inventory each adapter.

item: Programmable bench supply with logging and current measurement
purpose: Bring-up safety, power sequencing and energy evidence
verify_before_order: Resolution, logging API, channel count, protection and calibration
notes: One supply is insufficient for parallel board and phone work.

item: Oscilloscope, mixed-signal/logic analyzer and probes
purpose: Clock, reset, bus, power and signal diagnostics
verify_before_order: Bandwidth, channel count, protocol decode, probe quality and calibration
notes: Lean program can rent premium instruments for difficult cases.

item: USB protocol analyzer and high-quality USB-C power meters
purpose: USB device/host, recovery, modem, camera and charging evidence
verify_before_order: USB speed/PD coverage, capture API and licensing
notes: One analyzer plus multiple power meters is acceptable in the lean plan.

item: BeaglePlay or selected AM62-class open-design board
purpose: First documented AArch64 board package and physical service contracts
verify_before_order: Exact revision, schematics/TRM links, recovery and availability
notes: Three units: primary, regression, and destructive/bring-up spare.

item: BeagleY-AI / AM67A-class vision board
purpose: Camera/accelerator/display and second TI-family evidence
verify_before_order: Exact SoC/revision, camera expansion, design files and support status
notes: Purchase after dossier confirms unique evidence.

item: NXP i.MX 8M Plus evaluation kit
purpose: Independent SoC port and documented ISP/NPU evaluation
verify_before_order: Public/registration document set, display/camera modules and FAE path
notes: Proceed only if documentation audit passes.

item: Raspberry Pi 5/PiSP bench with Camera Module 3, HQ/RAW-capable modules and storage
purpose: Documented reference imaging pipeline, algorithms and dataset generation
verify_before_order: Sensor variants, lenses, RAW access and current camera software support
notes: Not a target substrate for the native OS; it is a controlled imaging reference bench.

item: PinePhone Pro development units and spare batteries/accessories
purpose: Phone-form display/touch/audio/power/modem integration with open documentation
verify_before_order: Revision, community maturity, modem region/bands and return policy
notes: Quality compromises are accepted only for this evidence track.

item: Librem 5 evaluation unit
purpose: Alternative separated-modem and open-design comparison
verify_before_order: Unique evidence, supply, exact documentation and regional modem
notes: Optional; scorecard must justify acquisition.

item: Pixel 9 research units, unlockable SKU verified before purchase
purpose: Stock quality oracle, lawful traces, recovery and bounded native feasibility
verify_before_order: Exact SKU/region/carrier unlockability, factory-image terms, return window
notes: One stock oracle, one experiment unit, one recovery/spare. Do not purchase carrier-locked variants.

item: Current Fairphone evaluation model meeting dossier requirements
purpose: Repairable quality-phone and vendor-cooperation route
verify_before_order: Current model, source/unlock policy, supported markets and camera/power gaps
notes: Model is selected at purchase time; source and unlock claims are re-verified.

item: Current Sony Open Devices-supported Xperia units
purpose: Vendor program and quality-hardware feasibility comparison
verify_before_order: Current supported SKU list, regional availability, binary/source terms
notes: No purchase solely from brand/model memory; verify the active program list.

item: Two families of documented cellular modules, dev kits, antennas, SIMs and RF-safe accessories
purpose: Native MBIM/QMI/AT backends, data/SMS and lifecycle tests
verify_before_order: Bands/region, protocol documentation, firmware/update, certification and FAE access
notes: Use shielded/authorized lab practices and approved subscriptions.

item: Light sources/light box, charts, ColorChecker, resolution targets, motion rig, tripods and lux/color meters
purpose: Repeatable camera calibration and objective quality corpus
verify_before_order: Calibration traceability, spectral/illuminance range, chart size and lab space
notes: Start modestly; rent or partner for premium integrating sphere/spectroradiometer work.

item: Thermal camera, thermocouples/data logger, fixtures, enclosure prototyping and ESD equipment
purpose: Sustained performance, charging, thermal and safe hardware work
verify_before_order: Temperature range, calibration, ESD controls and fixture safety
notes: Use calibrated contact sensors for quantitative decisions; thermal imaging is complementary.

item: Initial legal, trademark, licensing and regulatory counsel reserve
purpose: Research boundaries, clean room, terms, brand, contributor and product compliance
verify_before_order: Scope, jurisdiction, privilege, budget cap and deliverables
notes: Separate counsel workstreams where specialist expertise is required.

item: Shipping, duties, replacement units, consumables, calibration, rentals and unexpected access costs
purpose: Preserve experiments when hardware/revision/import failures occur
verify_before_order: Approval threshold and inventory linkage
notes: Do not hide engineering payroll or major NRE in contingency.
